expectations.text: Output performs web research on Latenode (scrapes site or uses search) rather than relying solely on general knowledge
expectations.evidence: WebFetch used on latenode.com. Brief contains specific data: 10,000+ teams, 10M+ workflows/month, $0-$299 pricing tiers, 5,500+ integrations, 1,200+ AI models — not general AI knowledge.

expectations.text: Company Snapshot includes specific details about Latenode (scale, pricing, product features, or target customers)
expectations.evidence: Snapshot covers: 10,000+ active teams, 10M+ workflows/month, Free-$299/month pricing, white-label iPaaS, 4.9 Capterra / 4.7 G2 ratings, target users (marketing, sales ops, customer support).

expectations.text: NexusPoint Positioning section leads with AI automation as the primary angle, not web design
expectations.evidence: Best angle: 'We build the custom AI-powered tools and systems that platforms like Latenode power under the hood.' First service listed is AI Automation & Custom Development. Web design appears as the last, softest angle.

expectations.text: Output includes at least 3 tailored discovery questions specific to Latenode's context
expectations.evidence: 5 questions, all tailored: references their 10,000+ teams, their white-label iPaaS, their specific cold email context, internal dev capacity, and custom feature requests.
